title: Rename branding from 'EduNex Aisa' to 'EduNex AI' across the entire app

requirements.text: Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the frontend HTML page title (frontend/index.html).

quotes: it's EduNex AI Not EduNex Aisa

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab/title bar shows 'EduNex AI' instead of 'EduNex Aisa'.

requirements.text: Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Navbar component (logo text, aria labels, and any other visible or hidden text).

quotes: it's EduNex AI Not EduNex Aisa

acceptanceCriteria: The navbar logo and all related text reads 'EduNex AI'.
No instance of 'EduNex Aisa' remains in the Navbar component.

requirements.text: Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Footer component (branding text, copyright line, mission statement, and any other visible text).

quotes: it's EduNex AI Not EduNex Aisa

acceptanceCriteria: The footer branding, copyright, and mission statement all read 'EduNex AI'.
No instance of 'EduNex Aisa' remains in the Footer component.

requirements.text: Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' across all remaining frontend source files including Home.tsx, App.tsx, tailwind.config.js, index.css, and any other file that contains the old name.

quotes: it's EduNex AI Not EduNex Aisa

acceptanceCriteria: A full-text search for 'EduNex Aisa' in the frontend directory returns zero results.
All user-facing and configuration references display 'EduNex AI'.

requirements.text: Replace every occurrence of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the backend Motoko source file (backend/main.mo), including any comments or string literals that reference the old name.

quotes: it's EduNex AI Not EduNex Aisa

acceptanceCriteria: No instance of 'EduNex Aisa' remains in backend/main.mo.
Backend functionality is unaffected by the rename.

constraints: Only rename the brand string — do not alter any logic, styling, or functionality.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing any visual design, color tokens, or layout.
Renaming internal variable or function names that do not surface in the UI.
